theme_expansion.generation_label: A nocturnal, bioluminescent botanical garden layout with flowing water and stone lantern highlights.
theme_expansion.concept: A tranquil midnight garden scene transitioning from dark, wet slate tones to glowing organic flora, emphasizing the contrast between cold stone architecture and warm, living light.
theme_expansion.narrative: The weapon becomes a cross-section of a secret moonlit courtyard. The stock anchors the scene in a dark, mossy perimeter, while the receiver serves as the primary pond feature, with the magazine acting as a submerged descent into the water.

elements.label: Pagoda Lantern
elements.description: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.

elements.label: Spectral Koi
elements.description: A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.

elements.label: Glowing Lotus
elements.description: Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.

elements.label: Black Bamboo
elements.description: Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.

elements.label: Water Ripples
elements.description: Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.

elements.label: Wet Flagstone
elements.description: Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.

elements.label: Weeping Willow Boughs
elements.description: Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.

elements.label: Firefly Swarm
elements.description: Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.

world_elements: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.
A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.
Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.
Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.
Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.
Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.
Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.
Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.
small symbolic objects related to the main theme
environmental fragments that imply a complete world
fine material grain and ornamental micro-detail
evaluation_criteria: Clarity of the bioluminescent highlights against the dark slate background.
Natural transition of the koi's flowing form across the magazine curve.
Degree of 'night atmosphere' achieved through the lighting palette.
theme_expansion.reference_policy: All visual references to botanical structures and traditional stone lanterns are derived from public domain nature photography and classical garden architecture, avoiding direct emulation of contemporary game artists.

directions.title: Stone and Emissivity
directions.concept: Prioritizes the architectural stone lantern as the primary structural anchor for the lighting.
directions.hero_strategy: Dense multi-scale theme artwork whose large crops remain visually complete.
directions.secondary_strategy: Distribute supporting motifs and material detail across the full canvas.
directions.connector_strategy: Use continuous line, colour, and texture rhythm rather than component stickers.
directions.background_strategy: Resolve the background as an active material field with no large dead zones.
directions.route_a_logic: Brief: garden. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Direction: Prioritizes the architectural stone lantern as the primary structural anchor for the lighting.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Motifs: pagoda lantern, mossy flagstone, firefly dust. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Material cues: porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route A objective: Establish a seamless, dense texture field of the garden floor and pond edge.. tiling stone textures with subtle moss overlays; interspersing glowing lotus buds at 15% density; rhythmic placement of bamboo segments to guide the eye. Emphasis: High density of stone cracks and moss.. Required: zero blank space, constant contrast ratio between stone and light, no large focal objects to allow for weapon-wide cropping. Avoid: sharp vector edges, uniform grid layouts, bright daylight saturation, industrial hardware schematics, hyper-realistic human anatomy.
directions.route_b_logic: Brief: garden. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Direction: Prioritizes the architectural stone lantern as the primary structural anchor for the lighting.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Motifs: pagoda lantern, mossy flagstone, firefly dust. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Material cues: porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route B objective: generate one complete, dense, crop-robust master artwork, fit it across continuous left/right/top weapon space, then automatically cut and repack it through the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Distribute useful visual information at multiple scales across the full image; avoid large empty regions. Subject-part placement on named weapon components is not required or evaluated. Avoid: sharp vector edges, uniform grid layouts, bright daylight saturation, industrial hardware schematics, hyper-realistic human anatomy.
directions.recommendation_reason: Distinct Stone and Emissivity interpretation with explicit Route A and crop-robust master-artwork Route B logic.

artwork_candidates.title: Narrative Panorama
artwork_candidates.variation: environment-led panorama with several separated story clusters, small figures or creatures, symbolic objects, layered foreground/midground/background, and rhythmic atmospheric connections
artwork_candidates.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: game weapon-skin source for later UV-aware composition. Generate one original dense landscape master artwork, approximately 16:9, for the Midnight Serenity weapon-skin theme. Theme content: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.; A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.; Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.; Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.; Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.; Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.; Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.; Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.. Narrative: The weapon becomes a cross-section of a secret moonlit courtyard. The stock anchors the scene in a dark, mossy perimeter, while the receiver serves as the primary pond feature, with the magazine acting as a submerged descent into the water.. Theme enrichment notes: Utilize a seamless, dark-to-light gradient across the weapon body to mimic the transition from the dark floor of the garden to the illuminated water surface.; The receiver should prioritize the stone lantern and the koi as the central focus.. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Fill the complete canvas with layered, high-quality, high-density visual information at several scales. Every large crop must remain attractive and richly detailed. Build a complete thematic world with many medium and small clusters: primary forms, related symbolic objects, environment, architecture or nature, atmospheric connectors, linework, and material texture. No single subject may dominate more than roughly 35% of the canvas width or height, and no subject may stretch across the full image width. Weave these elements through every region rather than arranging isolated stickers on empty space. Do not split it into component assets and do not reserve large plain or near-black areas. This image will be fitted to continuous weapon space and automatically cut into the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Do not draw a weapon, weapon mockup, UV layout, text, logo, watermark, frame, presentation board, or product render. Locked candidate art direction: Spectral Movement (candidate_02_direction_koi_flow). Concept: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Expanded thematic world: Pagoda Lantern, Spectral Koi, Glowing Lotus, Black Bamboo, Water Ripples, Wet Flagstone, Weeping Willow Boughs, Firefly Swarm, An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow., A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water., Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips., Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines., Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture., Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation., Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver., Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas., small symbolic objects related to the main theme, environmental fragments that imply a complete world, atmospheric connectors and motion rhythms, fine material grain and ornamental micro-detail, glowing lotus petals, translucent koi scales, segmented black bamboo, stacked pagodas, rippled dark water, wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift, porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route-B emphasis: Brief: garden. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Direction: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Material cues: porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route B objective: generate one complete, dense, crop-robust master artwork, fit it across continuous left/right/top weapon space, then automatically cut and repack it through the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Distribute useful visual information at multiple scales across the full image; avoid large empty regions. Subject-part placement on named weapon components is not required or evaluated. Avoid: sharp vector edges, uniform grid layouts, bright daylight saturation, industrial hardware schematics, hyper-realistic human anatomy.. Do not drift to another art direction. CRITICAL SOURCE-ASSET MODE: all weapon names, component names, and placement descriptions above are placement metadata only for later composition. No weapon or weapon part may appear. Do not depict, imply, crop, silhouette, emboss, or texture any firearm, weapon, receiver, trigger, grip, magazine, stock, barrel, muzzle, mechanical weapon part, weapon mockup, product mockup, UV layout, rectangular material sample, framed tile, or presentation board. COMPOSITION-GROUP CONTRACT: preserve the requested spatial structure and narrative purpose exactly; spanning sources must read as one continuous elongated subject, grouped sources as coordinated reusable units, and independent sources as one component-specific mark. MASTER-ARTWORK CONTRACT: create one dense, opaque, edge-to-edge landscape thematic artwork with strong local detail at multiple scales. Large crops from any part of the image must remain visually rich. Use many medium and small subject clusters rather than one oversized subject: no single element may occupy more than roughly 35% of the canvas width or height, and no subject may span the complete image width. Weave primary motifs, supporting symbols, environmental fragments, atmospheric connectors, linework, and material texture through every region. Do not isolate motifs as separate stickers and do not leave large plain or near-black negative-space pockets. Do not draw a weapon, weapon part, mockup, UV layout, text, logo, watermark, border, framed panel, presentation board, or product render. Subject-part placement is not evaluated. Output only the landscape 2D source artwork, approximately 16:9, with no text, logo, watermark, border, annotation, or explanation.
CANDIDATE VARIATION 1: environment-led panorama with several separated story clusters, small figures or creatures, symbolic objects, layered foreground/midground/background, and rhythmic atmospheric connections. Create a materially different composition from the other candidates while preserving the locked direction and palette. Include at least ten visually distinct clusters distributed across the landscape canvas. Keep the main theme readable through repeated medium/small appearances and related elements, not one giant central subject.

validation.semantic_status: The artwork successfully depicts a dense, nocturnal garden scene consistent with the Midnight Serenity theme. It avoids all forbidden elements, including text, weapons, and framing, and features a high density of thematic clusters (koi, stone lanterns, lotus flowers, bamboo, and prayer beads) distributed across the canvas without any single subject dominating the composition.

artwork_candidates.title: Ornamental Tapestry
artwork_candidates.variation: symbol-led tapestry with repeated medium motifs, treasure-like details, patterned borders dissolved into the field, material ornament, and dense micro-symbols

Generate one original dense landscape master artwork, approximately 16:9, for the Midnight Serenity weapon-skin theme. Theme content: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.; A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.; Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.; Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.; Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.; Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.; Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.; Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.. Narrative: The weapon becomes a cross-section of a secret moonlit courtyard. The stock anchors the scene in a dark, mossy perimeter, while the receiver serves as the primary pond feature, with the magazine acting as a submerged descent into the water.. Theme enrichment notes: Utilize a seamless, dark-to-light gradient across the weapon body to mimic the transition from the dark floor of the garden to the illuminated water surface.; The receiver should prioritize the stone lantern and the koi as the central focus.. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Fill the complete canvas with layered, high-quality, high-density visual information at several scales. Every large crop must remain attractive and richly detailed. Build a complete thematic world with many medium and small clusters: primary forms, related symbolic objects, environment, architecture or nature, atmospheric connectors, linework, and material texture. No single subject may dominate more than roughly 35% of the canvas width or height, and no subject may stretch across the full image width. Weave these elements through every region rather than arranging isolated stickers on empty space. Do not split it into component assets and do not reserve large plain or near-black areas. This image will be fitted to continuous weapon space and automatically cut into the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Do not draw a weapon, weapon mockup, UV layout, text, logo, watermark, frame, presentation board, or product render. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Keep the main theme readable through repeated medium/small appearances and related elements, not one giant central subject.
